zh: 僵住，因為緊張或驚訝而無法動彈
en: I froze when someone asked me what I did yesterday.
en_example: I froze when someone asked me what I did yesterday.
zh_example: I froze when someone asked me what I did yesterday.
ja: 緊張や驚きで動けなくなること
ja_example: I froze when someone asked me what I did yesterday.

zh: 伸展，拉長肌肉或身體部位
en: I stretched my arms to wake up my muscles.
en_example: I stretched my arms to wake up my muscles.
zh_example: I stretched my arms to wake up my muscles.
ja: 筋肉や体の一部を伸ばすこと
ja_example: I stretched my arms to wake up my muscles.

zh: 燕麥粥，一種健康的早餐食品
en: I had oatmeal with fruit for breakfast.
en_example: I had oatmeal with fruit for breakfast.
zh_example: I had oatmeal with fruit for breakfast.
ja: オートミール、健康的な朝食の一種
ja_example: I had oatmeal with fruit for breakfast.

en: I wore a white blouse to work.
en_example: I wore a white blouse to work.
zh_example: I wore a white blouse to work.
ja: 女性用の薄手のシャツ
ja_example: I wore a white blouse to work.

en: I wore black trousers to the office.
en_example: I wore black trousers to the office.
zh_example: I wore black trousers to the office.
ja_example: I wore black trousers to the office.

en: The bus was very crowded, so I stood all the way.
en_example: The bus was very crowded, so I stood all the way.
zh_example: The bus was very crowded, so I stood all the way.
ja: 混雑している、多くの人がいる
ja_example: The bus was very crowded, so I stood all the way.

en: I had lunch with my colleague Anna.
en_example: I had lunch with my colleague Anna.
zh_example: I had lunch with my colleague Anna.
ja_example: I had lunch with my colleague Anna.

zh: 超市，販售各種食品和日用品的商店
en: I went to the supermarket to buy vegetables and milk.
en_example: I went to the supermarket to buy vegetables and milk.
zh_example: I went to the supermarket to buy vegetables and milk.
ja: スーパーマーケット、食品や日用品を売る店
ja_example: I went to the supermarket to buy vegetables and milk.

en: Reading a book helps me relax.
en_example: Reading a book helps me relax.
zh_example: Reading a book helps me relax.
ja: リラックスする、ストレスや緊張を和らげる
ja_example: Reading a book helps me relax.
